meta.title: UniPower - Your Energy, Your Way
meta.description: Switch to a smarter energy plan. Competitive rates, renewable options, and tools to manage your electricity usage.

hero.title: Energy that works for you
hero.subtitle: Compare our electricity plans and find the right fit for your home. Simple pricing, no hidden fees, and options to go green.

products.title: Explore our services
products.subtitle: From electricity plans to solar and EV solutions, we have everything you need for a smarter energy future.

cards.title: Electricity Plans
cards.description: Choose from fixed, variable, and time-of-use plans designed to suit every household.
features: No hidden fees or exit charges

cards.title: Solar & Storage
cards.description: Harness the power of the sun with our solar panel and battery storage solutions.

cards.title: Electric Vehicles
cards.description: Power your EV with competitive charging plans and smart home charging solutions.

howItWorks.title: Switching is simple
howItWorks.subtitle: Move to a better energy deal in just a few steps. We handle the hard part.

steps.title: Compare plans
steps.description: Enter your address and see plans available in your area with estimated costs.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Pick the plan that suits your household — fixed, variable, time-of-use, or green.

steps.title: Sign up online
steps.description: Complete your details in minutes. No paperwork, no phone calls required.

steps.title: Start saving
steps.description: We notify your old provider. Your supply continues uninterrupted while we switch you over.

savingsTips.title: Simple ways to lower your bill
savingsTips.subtitle: Small changes add up. Here are some easy ways to reduce your energy costs.

tips.title: Shift to off-peak
tips.description: Run your dishwasher, washing machine, and dryer during off-peak hours to take advantage of lower rates.

tips.title: Optimise heating & cooling
tips.description: Set your thermostat to 18-20°C in winter and 24-26°C in summer. Each degree saves up to 10% on heating and cooling.

tips.title: Switch to LED lighting
tips.description: LED bulbs use up to 80% less energy than traditional bulbs and last up to 25 times longer.

tips.title: Monitor your usage
tips.description: Use our app to track your daily consumption and identify where you can cut back.

manageEnergy.title: Take control of your energy
manageEnergy.subtitle: Our tools make it easy to understand and manage your electricity usage.

features.title: Real-time usage tracking
features.description: See your energy consumption as it happens, broken down by time of day.

features.title: Bill predictions
features.description: Know what your next bill will be before it arrives, with no surprises.

features.title: Solar dashboard
features.description: Track your solar generation, battery storage, and grid export in one place.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Join the thousands of households making smarter energy choices.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Switching was incredibly easy. I'm saving around 15% compared to my old provider, and I love that my plan is 100% renewable.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: The app is brilliant. I can see exactly when I'm using the most energy and shift things to off-peak. My bills have dropped noticeably.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: The solar and storage bundle was exactly what we needed. Installation was smooth and we're already seeing savings on our monthly bill.

whyChoose.title: Why choose us?
whyChoose.subtitle: We make energy simple, affordable, and sustainable for everyone.

items.title: Competitive rates
items.description: Transparent pricing with no lock-in contracts on select plans. Our rates are regularly benchmarked against the market.

items.title: Green energy options
items.description: Choose plans powered by up to 100% renewable energy sources. We invest in wind, solar, and hydro projects.

items.title: Award-winning service
items.description: Trusted by over a million customers with industry-leading satisfaction ratings and 24/7 support.

cta.title: Ready to switch?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of happy customers who have already made the switch. It only takes a few minutes.
